title: Senior Technology Consultant - T24
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • The candidate needs to serve as a trusted advisor to banking clients across the full T24 project lifecycle -including Analysis & Design, Implementation, Go-Live, and Post-Go-Live Support.
  • Effectively collaborate with senior management, technical and business teams, vendors, and key stakeholders to drive project success and meet objectives.
  • Lead designated areas of responsibility such as testing strategy and execution, data migration planning, systems integration, cutover planning, and implementation activities.
  • Configure and validate customized Temenos T24 functionalities, ensuring comprehensive user acceptance and delivering high-quality solutions.
  • Develop clear, concise, and comprehensive technical documentation for both internal and client-facing audiences.
  • Provide technical training to client teams and end-users as needed.
  • Contribute to the design and execution of migration strategies to ensure seamless project delivery.

Technical and Professional Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 12+ years of experience in technical consultancy and expert services, preferably with Temenos T24 software within a banking environment.
  • Demonstrated successful delivery of end-to-end T24 Core Banking and/or Wealth Suite transformation projects.
  • Strong understanding of T24 architecture and design principles.
  • A solid combination of technical expertise and product knowledge, with hands-on experience in one or more of the following T24 modules: Securities and Corporate Actions, Derivatives (DX), Structured Products (SY), Treasury Modules(MM, FX, and Swaps), Financial Accounting.
  • Experience with Financial Accounting and GL reporting, including preparation of accounting schemas, charts of accounts, and resolving GL mismatches.
  • Practical experience in T24 upgrades, TAFC to TAFJ migrations, and performance tuning (advantageous).
  • Familiarity with integration frameworks such as IRIS and design frameworks (preferred).
  • Strong technical proficiency in: INFOBASIC, T24 JAVA API coding, JAVA, Oracle 10+ operating systems.
  • Working knowledge of UNIX, AS400, and NT operating systems, with an understanding of disk structures.
  • Experience integrating T24 with Wealth Suite components, including TAP, TTI, and TDS.

Mandatory Requirement:

  • Hands-on project implementation experience in T24 modules is a must as this is a purely implementation-focused role.
  • Strong technical expertise and in-depth product knowledge in one or more of the following T24 modules is a must: Securities and Corporate Actions, Derivatives (DX), Structured Products (SY), Payments(TPH) and Treasury Modules (MM, FX,Swaps), Financial Accounting.

postedCompany.description:
Blazecorp is a consulting and workforce solutions provider based in Singapore, offering a wide range of services aimed at helping businesses modernize and optimize their operations. They specialize in digital transformation, engineering, and workforce solutions, including recruitment services for permanent, contract, and executive roles. Blazecorp also provides consulting in technology strategy, workforce transformation, and cloud computing, helping businesses leverage innovative solutions to drive growth and efficiency.

Their headquarters is located at 160 Robinson Road, Singapore, and they have a strong focus on Southeast Asia, working with clients from various industries to provide tailor-made solutions​
postedCompany.name: BLAZECORP PTE. LTD.
